assignment.title: Trace Evidence Assignment
assignment.instructor_text:
Microscopic evidence at a crime scene is called Trace Evidence.  Hair and fiber are examples of this type of evidence and they can be valuable in an investigation.  Although most hair and fiber are identified and not individualized, they can still be used in court to support cases.  In the assignment below, you will demonstrate your understanding of this unit.

Complete the following assignment about trace evidence. Click on the image below to make a copy of the Trace Evidence Assignment.  Remember to double click on the header to open it and add your name to the document.

When you have completed the assignment, upload it below and select Submit to complete your submission.

Revisit the Course Information section if you need a refresher on how to submit your assignments.
